producer: demiurge RTSC M471 — hexa-rtsc n=6 RT-SC family slot (algebraic / lattice-derived) import. This record carries the *master n=6 algebraic spec* (Tc=300 K claim · Hc2=σ·τ=48 T closed-form) with NO concrete compound — it is the abstract claim-only slot the §8.2 family matrix points to as `hexa-rtsc n=6 candidate`, distinct from the §8.5 hexa-rtsc-DERIVED record (PR #90 exports/conductor/hts_rebco/) which is gate_type=hexa-rtsc-derived for the SIMULATION-derived REBCO numbers.
stub_note: Schema record carrying the algebraic CLAIM only — no measurement, no compound, no synthesis recipe. Tc=300 K and Hc2=48 T are number-theoretic targets derived from n=6 perfect-number identities (σ(6)=12, τ(6)=4, σ·τ=48), NOT physical measurements. Per RTSC.md §8.8/§8.9, this record is forever `absorbed=false` until (and unless) all 5 hard gates pass — which by definition requires a wet-lab measurement triad (Tc / R=0 / Meissner) that does not exist for any concrete realisation of this slot.
source_note: `hexa-rtsc-derived` here describes the *lineage* (closed-form algebra on the n=6 lattice). It is DISTINCT from the schema field `gate_type` which is `empirically-unproven` for THIS record (claim-only family), not `hexa-rtsc-derived` (which is reserved for simulation-derived numerical predictions of EXISTING families like REBCO — see PR #90 sibling).

spec.family_enum_note: ConductorMaterial = cu | nbti | nb3sn | rebco | bi2212 | rtsc_hypothetical (RTSC.md §5 Axis B / §8.6). This record = rtsc_hypothetical (the claim-only enum case). spec.family maps 1:1 to the ConductorMaterial enum.
spec.compound_note: No concrete compound is named at this slot. The master algebraic spec asserts Tc/Hc2 targets without specifying which (if any) material realises them. The named-compound sub-claim is carried by sibling records n6_mk2_lcyscH24 / n6_y_ca_h6_predicted.
spec.tc_k_note: CLAIM ONLY — n=6 algebraic target Tc = σ·J₂ + 6·(sopfr+n)·10 = 12·24 + 6·(5+6)·10 - ... = 300 K (number-theoretic numerology per hexa-rtsc papers/n6-ultimate-superconductor-integrated-paper.md §1, §6). NOT a measurement. NOT a DFT prediction. NOT bounded by a recipe. R4 invariant (RTSC.md §8.8) blocks absorbed=true permanently absent the 5-gate (§8.9) wet-lab triad.
spec.hc2_t_at_4k_note: CLAIM ONLY — n=6 algebraic target Hc2 = σ(6) · τ(6) = 12 · 4 = 48 T (closed-form, three independent paths: σ·τ, J₂²/σ, (2σ)²/(2n) all = 48 — hexa-rtsc/verify/calc_hc2_48t.hexa). Algebraic identity, NOT a measurement.
spec.hc2_t_at_77k_note: Not specified by the master algebraic spec (claim-only slot does not parametrise temperature dependence beyond Tc=300 K · Hc2(0)=48 T).
spec.pressure_gpa_note: CLAIM ONLY — ambient pressure (0 GPa) is part of the RT-SC claim (per RTSC.md §8.9 (a) definition of `진짜 RTSC` = Tc ≥ 270 K + ambient pressure). No experimental realisation of this slot exists at ambient pressure.

jc_b_t_theta.description: No Jc(B,T,θ) for a claim-only material — there is no sample to characterise. Field intentionally left as a null stub. A real Jc table would require a synthesised sample and a measurement; both are absent by definition for this slot.

provenance.source_citation: hexa-rtsc/papers/n6-superconductor-paper.md (n=6 arithmetic seed) · hexa-rtsc/papers/n6-ultimate-superconductor-integrated-paper.md §1 + §6 (Tc=300 K + Hc2=48 T claims) · hexa-rtsc/rtsc/room-temp-sc.md §1 + §7 (Tc / Hc2 number-theoretic targets) · hexa-rtsc/verify/calc_hc2_48t.hexa (closed-form 48 T = σ·τ derivation, three independent identity paths).
provenance.derive_chain: hexa-rtsc n=6 lattice (perfect-number identity σ(6)·φ(6) = n·τ(6) = 24 at unique n=6) -> closed-form algebraic spec (Tc=300 K · Hc2=48 T) -> this conductor claim-only record. NO simulation, NO synthesis route, NO measurement. The chain stops at algebra.
provenance.atlas_provenance_note: Per RTSC.md line 1034 (2026-05-22 atlas mining session): hexa atlas 7448 nodes' SC content = n6 numerological framework only (Tc 300K = target · Hc2 48T = numerology), measured-oracle Tc data = ZERO. This record honestly reflects that atlas mining result — the slot is ALGEBRA, not measurement.

absorbed_invariant_note: absorbed=false is PERMANENT for this slot until and unless RTSC.md §8.9 5-gate matrix is fully passed (synthesis possibility ≥ 3 independent labs · Tc measurement triad · ambient pressure · ≥3 independent lab replication · long-term stability). The current §8.9 row for `hexa-rtsc n=6` shows `✗ no recipe — never` (a FAIL at the synthesis gate alone is sufficient to lock absorbed=false). Flipping this field from an algebraic claim would directly violate RTSC.md §8.8 invariant + governance @D d5 (`absorbed=true ⇔ all non-wet-lab gates PASS`, AND wet-lab confirmation for RTSC-family per §8.9).
gate_type_enum_note: gate_type ∈ { vendor-datasheet | hexa-rtsc-derived | external-paper | empirically-unproven } per RTSC.md §8.5 + §8.6. This record uses `empirically-unproven` (NOT `hexa-rtsc-derived`) — the gate distinction is the whole point of this M471 record vs the PR #90 sibling: `hexa-rtsc-derived` covers SIMULATION-derived numbers for KNOWN families (REBCO Tc~92 K from BCS/closed-form lineage), `empirically-unproven` covers ALGEBRAIC CLAIM-ONLY targets (n=6 Tc=300 K with no compound, no measurement, no recipe).
scope_caveats: claim-only — algebraic / lattice-derived (n=6); no experimental measurement; never `absorbed=true` until measured (RTSC.md §8.8 invariant + §8.9 5-gate matrix).

STUB record — schema exemplar for the rtsc_hypothetical / empirically-unproven slot. Tc=300 K and Hc2=48 T are n=6 number-theoretic TARGETS, not measurements. No vendor lot, no DFT corpus entry, no synthesis route.

Distinct from the §8.5 hexa-rtsc-DERIVED schema (PR #90 exports/conductor/hts_rebco/conductor_rebco_hts_baseline.json) which uses gate_type=hexa-rtsc-derived for SIMULATION-derived REBCO numbers; THIS record's gate_type=empirically-unproven covers the CLAIM-ONLY algebraic family slot.

Per RTSC.md §8.9 5-gate matrix, the `hexa-rtsc n=6` row reads `(a) ✗ no recipe — never` — synthesis-possibility gate alone is sufficient to lock absorbed=false permanently absent a future named compound + reproduced wet-lab measurement.
demiurge MUST NOT use this record as conductor input to a real device producer (getdp_hts.py or similar). RTSC.md §8.2 last line: `claim-only RT-SC / hexa-rtsc n=6 are *device producer 입력으로 사용 금지*`.

If a future named compound + measurement triad + ≥3 independent lab replication arrives, a NEW record (different candidate_id) supersedes this slot — this slot itself remains the algebraic-claim anchor.
r4_invariant: absorbed=false · provisional=true · gate_type=empirically-unproven · domain=conductor · family=rtsc_hypothetical. R4 preserved — claim-only algebraic spec is not a measurement, not a simulation prediction, not a device input. The slot exists to make the §8.2 `hexa-rtsc n=6 candidate` row addressable as a typed record without claiming any empirical content.
